title.en: The island has been chosen, and the city has be...

content.en:
Ye Tian was going to build a city on an island in the Origin Black River as the location of this auction.

He wouldn't go to the middle of the country, and those Origin Realm overlords in the middle of the country had to come here if they wanted to inherit the fourth path.

Even if he is placed in the east, those Origin Upper Realm Overlords will come over.

Soon.

The island has been chosen, and the city has been built.

this day.

One Origin Upper Realm Overlord after another has arrived, second only in scale to the last trade fair.

And the person who presided over this auction was naturally Ye Tian and Xuanyan Club.

Soon, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord was almost here.

And so the auction began.

meeting.

A group of Origin Upper Realm Overlords sat below, Ye Tian appeared, and said: "Everyone, I am the Lord of Endless, the fourth path was researched by me, and this time it will be auctioned here......"

However, before he could say much, an Origin Upper Realm Overlord stood up and said, "Endless Lord, we are very curious about the fourth path, so we want to fight with you and witness the strength of the fourth path, I don't know if it's okay?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian knew that they wanted to know now if the fourth path was real and if there were any flaws.

Although they want to inherit the fourth way, they also need to understand it.

Ye Tian couldn't refuse, otherwise this group of Origin Upper Realm Overlords wouldn't have left it at that.

Some of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords here are not weak, and among them, there are existences that have awakened five or six times, or broken the boundary of the Origin on the other side five or six times.

With that kind of strength, he is not an opponent.

At this time.

The Origin Upper Realm Overlord who wanted to fight Ye Tian was an Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had completed the second awakening of the Origin Ancestor on the other side - Crocodile Ancestor!

Origins above the Black River.

Ye Tian and the Crocodile Ancestor stood in the void, trying not to destroy the Origin Black River.

"Let's get started!"

The other Origin Upper Realm Overlords watched.

"Bloody crocodile body!"

The Crocodile Ancestor turned into an incomparably terrifying giant crocodile, and the terrifying aura was enough to shatter the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

The blood crocodile body is the origin ancestor of the crocodile ancestor, the effect is that the power is huge, the defense is terrifying, and the flaw is that the speed is slower.

Immediately afterwards, a set of armor appeared on the crocodile ancestor, which was a high-level treasure on the other side.

When it comes to their realm, all of them are high-level treasures, which is the basic standard.

Ye Tian also took out his high-grade Beyond Treasure Spear.

In an instant, the two sides fought.

Then.

Ye Tian's reincarnation Haotian body exploded, and the origin of reincarnation Haotian was also stimulated, and he performed the other side slashing technique, and collided with the crocodile ancestor with one blow.

Bang!!!!!

The terrifying impact shattered countless voids, and even shattered an area of the Origin Black River.

Under normal circumstances, the second awakening of the Origin Ancestor on the other side will inevitably be very strong.

But at this moment, all the Origin Upper Realm Overlords were stunned.

The Crocodile Ancestor was knocked away, and the high-level Supreme Treasure on his body cracked, and his body continued to crack.

This is clearly a big gap in strength.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian shot again, and the crocodile ancestor was not an opponent at all.

In the blink of an eye, the armor of the Crocodile Ancestor's body was shattered, and his body was pierced one by one, and the injuries were not light.

"Throw in the towel!"

Crocodile Ancestor hurriedly said.

At this moment, the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords didn't dare to underestimate Ye Tian.

Although Ye Tiancai had just broken through, his true strength was stronger than the average Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had completed three awakenings, and it was definitely comparable to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened four times.

Actually, Ye Tian didn't expect the crocodile ancestor to be so weak.

"It's not that the crocodile ancestor is weak, it's that I'm too strong!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He had originally broken through with the Reincarnation Haotian Body, which was a supreme Origin Ancestor Sect, and his strength naturally far surpassed that of other Origin Upper Realm Overlords, but he had never really fought with other Origin Upper Realm Overlords, so he underestimated his strength.

The reincarnation of Haotian Body Method plus the fourth path caused his current strength to not be calculated according to normal.

"Lord of Endless, you are cultivating the body of reincarnation of Haotian, right?"

An Origin Upper Realm Overlord suddenly asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

"Reincarnation Haotian Body, I think I also wanted to cultivate at the beginning, but unfortunately I didn't get the inheritance!" muttered the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

Many Origin Upper Realm Overlords had also heard of the Reincarnation Haotian Body, and they were all very surprised to see that Ye Tian had broken through with this Origin Ancestor Body method on the other side.

Of course.

Compared with the self-created fourth path, even if it is the body of reincarnation Haotian, it is extremely inferior.

Subsequently, many Origin Upper Realm Overlords went back.

The auction still has to be held.

Then.

Ye Tian took out a copy of the Fourth Path Inheritance and said: "This is a inheritance of the Fourth Path, now the auction will begin, barter, whoever bids the highest price, I will pass this inheritance to him, but I must make an oath and not pass it on!"

Subsequently.

The auction has begun!

But competition is not motivating, although everyone wants to be the first to get this inheritance, but this time it is impossible to have only one inheritance.

Sure enough, after only competing for a while, no one competed, and it was obtained by an Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

After taking out the treasure, he obtained the inheritance through the transaction, and immediately went to investigate the inheritance.

After that, one inheritance after another was taken out and traded.

A total of thirty copies were traded, and this is the end.

Of course.

Ye Tian also took out some three-source secret medicines.

"Everyone, the three-source secret medicine is a necessary secret medicine to take the fourth path, you can create other secret medicines, but at present, only the three-source secret medicine can help to take the fourth path!" Ye Tian said.

Thereupon.

A group of Origin Upper Realm Overlords bid for the Three-Origin Secret Medicine.

Of course.

Most of them don't use the three-source secret medicine, and they can only be used for collection and research.

After that, the auction was over, and after the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had obtained the inheritance looked at the fourth path, he suddenly felt that the fourth path was too difficult, even if he consulted Ye Tian, he still didn't expect to practice.

But Ye Tian didn't care if they could practice, he just gave them a hope.

Moreover, those Origin Upper Realm Overlords who had already completed their awakening or broken the boundary of the Origin on the other side would not be able to abandon their cultivation and rebuild the fourth path, which would damage the foundation of their bodies, unless there was an incomparably rare but precious treasure to make up for the foundation, they would dare to do so.

But if you fail, your future potential will be even worse.

After a while, this group of Origin Upper Realm Overlords left.

"It won't be long before the information about the fourth path will definitely spread, and it is estimated that many Origin Upper Realm Overlords will study it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
